title: The best modpacks for your adventure
description: There are rideable dinosaurs, DNA and fossils. Also dragons, magic and even utility golems. Added beautiful biomes for the best adventure.
body:
There are rideable dinosaurs, DNA and fossils. Also dragons, magic. Added beautiful biomes for the best adventure.
For dinosaures add
-triceratops
-T-rex
-Velociraptor
-gallimimus
And mores
New crafting recipe and armores 
New Tools(swords-axe-pickaxe)

It's a perfect modpack to make an unforgettable adventure solo or with friends.
